item.title: Real-Time Ray Tracer
item.description: A real-time ray tracing engine in C++, implemented with a variety of acceleration structures, including bounding volume hierarchy (BVH), kd-tree, and grid structures.

item.title: Custom 3D Rasterization Engine
item.description: A rasterization engine written with C++ and FLTK where I implemented a variety of rendering techniques, including pixel-accurate shadows with irregular z-buffering, and reflections in environment maps.

item.title: hashtagcuber.com
item.description: A project where I explore the Square-1, a Rubik’s cube variant puzzle. These experiments include implementing a graph representation of puzzle state subset known as OBL, developing an algorithm to generate transformations of a puzzle turn sequence, and more.

item.title: VR for Language Learning
item.description: I created a VR game for a research group at Purdue University’s School of Languages and Cultures, who are studying the role of VR in language learning. This game tasks the user with matching the target language sounds with its corresponding character, in this case Japanese language’s hiragana.
